Startup MVP

Two-Sided Marketplace MVP

The demo walks through consultant onboarding, buyer discovery, booking, and escrow release from one flow.

Source ProfileBuild Something Similar

Project Details

Client Type

Early-stage startup

Delivery Timeline

8 weeks

Stack

ReactNode.jsFirebaseStripeVercel

Case Study Walkthrough

Challenge

Founders needed a polished product experience quickly to test demand and confidently present to investors.

Solution

  • Designed dual-sided onboarding with tailored dashboards for consultants and buyers.
  • Implemented secure booking and escrow payment releases via Stripe.
  • Launched social proof loops with verified reviews and repeat booking flows.

Outcome

Launched in 8 weeks. Secured $400k seed round using the live product as a demo.

Session Package

Total

Demo Flow

Marketplace Flow Preview

Dual Onboarding Paths

Separate account setup for consultants and SMB buyers with role-aware onboarding steps.

Higher completion rates in first-session onboarding.

Booking + Escrow Checkout

Buyers schedule sessions and lock payment into escrow before project kickoff.

Reduced payment risk for both sides.

Trust Layer

Verified reviews and completion badges help buyers make faster hiring decisions.

Stronger conversion from listing view to booking.
